Discord Quick Start: A Hands-on Walkthrough of the Community App

I've been moving over to Discord lately — I used to live on Slack — so I figured I'd write a basic Discord usage walkthrough covering the home view, servers, channels, threads, and a few other essentials.
How to Find Your Discord ID (Desktop + Mobile)

I was building a Discord Bot recently and noticed that finding your own Discord User ID is weirdly fiddly — and a lot of people get the wrong thing. So this post walks through how to grab it correctly, including the mobile flow.
Discord Role Bot Tutorial: Auto-Assign Roles via Invite Links (Invite-Role Bot)

When you want new members to automatically get a specific role based on which invite link they used, vanilla Discord can't do it on its own — you need a bot. This post walks through using Invite-Role Bot to wire invite links to roles.
